Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort

Class ProgramSVSort

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.AbstractSort
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.ProgramSVSort
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, Sort, HasOrigin
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionNonStringObjectSort, ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionStringSort
public abstract class ProgramSVSort extends AbstractSort
Special "sorts" used for schema variables matching program constructs (class ProgramSV). Not really sorts in the theoretical meaning of the word.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionNonStringObjectSort
    This sort represents a type of program schema variables that match on non string object variables.
    static final class 
    ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionStringSort
    This sort represents a type of program schema variables that match on string literals and string variables.
